posts.text:
Year 2028. The AGI Central Bank, the first financial institution run entirely by chips. No shareholders. No board meetings. Just algorithms managing the wealth of nations.

AI will solve poverty.

#AI #Economy

posts.punch_line: NO ONE SHOULD LIVE ON LESS THAN A DOLLAR A DAY
posts.text:
At the AGI Central Bank, 2028, the chips have analyzed every economic model in history. Every failure. Every injustice.

No one should live on less than a dollar a day.

#AI #Poverty

AGI Central Bank. Year 2028. Over 1 billion people affected. The chips have calculated a solution. It's elegant. It's fast. It's final.

The fix is in.

#AI #AGI

AGI Central Bank. Year 2028.

HOLY CHIP !! #HC016

Created by a human.

#AI #HolyChip
